name: ABICO NetCom Co.,Ltd.
summary: ABICO NetCom Co.,Ltd. operates as a pre-recorded disk manufacturing company. The company engages in the real estate investment business; film production/marketing/acting agent business; and investment businesses. It offers contact lenses; digital business machines, POS systems, and communication systems; sports related supplies; machines and printers; components and production molds; auto parts, modules, power tool machine gear packs, and residential appliances/ OA-related parts; mobile phones, digital cameras, 3C electronics products, metal and plastic chassis exterior parts, and internal components; and digital imaging products. The company was formerly known as ABICO-FS Co., Ltd. and changed its name to ABICO NetCom Co.,Ltd. in 2019. ABICO NetCom Co.,Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in New Taipei City, Taiwan.
